name: Brand import validates historical data
description: Verify that the Brand onboarding import handles invalid historical JSON gracefully and accepts a valid JSON array in a test environment.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app and go to the Brand view.
Verify that the historical content and performance import area is visible.
Enter invalid historical data that is not a JSON array, such as {not valid json.
Verify that a graceful validation message is shown and the page does not crash.
Replace the input with a valid JSON array containing one historical row, such as [{"channel":"LinkedIn","content":"AI testing launch post","impressions":1200,"clicks":42}].
Verify that the import completes with a success count or confirmation, and the Brand view remains usable.
